title: Raspberry Revel Crisp
description: A sweet and tangy dessert featuring fresh raspberries and a crunchy revel topping.
instructions: Mix raspberries, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract in a bowl.
Roll out the revel and flour mixture to form a flat sheet.
Place the revel mixture on top of the raspberry mixture.
Mix cold butter and oatmeal in another bowl.
Add the oatmeal mixture on top of the revel mixture.
Bake in the oven for 35-40 minutes.
Check if the topping is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Serve warm with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream.
Enjoy your delicious raspberry revel crisp!
